name: claude-log-bridge
description: Display browser console logs captured from the local log server directly inside VS Code.

commands.title: Claude Log Bridge: Show Browser Logs
Claude Log Bridge: Start Live Watch
Claude Log Bridge: Stop Live Watch

claudeLogBridge.serverUrl.description: URL of the local Claude Log Bridge server.

claudeLogBridge.pollIntervalMs.description: How often (ms) to poll the server for new logs when live watch is active.

claudeLogBridge.logFilePath.description: Path (relative to workspace root) of the plain-text log file written by the server.

claudeLogBridge.maxDisplayedLogs.description: Maximum number of log entries to display in the output channel.
